text: I feel a quiet sense of curiosity in this well-lit, modern space. The glass walls separate me from the vibrant, thought-provoking exhibit ahead. The bold 'R+D' on the wall invites contemplation about innovation and the relationship between humans and technology. The presence of screens and written words makes me ponder the intersection of art, science, and the stories we tell ourselves while shaping the future. There is an air of creative anticipation here.
